subject: Wire async execution path end-to-end (aexecute → acomplete)
description: aexecute_iteration at standard_agent.py:486 calls sync self.llm.complete() via run_in_executor. Should call self.llm.acomplete() directly. At least one executor should call aexecute(). Currently the entire async infrastructure is dead code.

subject: Add threading.Lock to ApprovalWorkflow._requests
description: ApprovalWorkflow._requests dict accessed from background polling threads without synchronization. Multi-step read-modify patterns non-atomic even under GIL. Safety-critical component gating dangerous tool executions. Zero concurrent tests.

subject: Extract src/database/ from observability — shared DB infrastructure
description: src/observability/ doubles as shared database layer with 30+ import sites across self_improvement, experimentation, core/test_support. Extract get_session, DatabaseManager, init_database to dedicated src/database/ package. Unblocks fixes for 6+ downstream issues.

subject: Fix ToolRegistryProtocol.get_tool() → get() to match implementation
description: Protocol at domain_state.py:86 defines get_tool(name) but ToolRegistry at registry.py:145 has get(name, version). No class implements get_tool(). Rename Protocol method to get(). Add conformance test.

subject: Use SQL atomic increments for experimentation counters
description: variant.total_executions += 1 at service.py:533 is read-modify-write race. Concurrent workflow executions silently lose increments. Replace with update(Variant).values(total_executions=Variant.total_executions + 1).

subject: Add tests for untested self_improvement modules
description: 15+ source files completely untested: deployer.py, loop/orchestrator.py, error_recovery.py, pattern_mining.py, strategy_learning.py, and more. Priority: deployer.py (deployment), orchestrator.py (experiment execution), error_recovery.py (error handling).

subject: Rebase ~15 orphan exception classes onto FrameworkException
description: CheckpointNotFoundError, CircuitBreakerError, WorkflowCancelledError, OAuthError, ExperimentError, and ~10 more inherit from bare Exception. A top-level except FrameworkException misses all of these.

subject: Fix ValidationError backward-compat alias (function → class)
description: exceptions.py:641 implements ValidationError as a function, not a class. Breaks isinstance, except, type annotations, subclassing. Regression from prior audit fix. Make proper class inheriting FrameworkValidationError.

subject: Create database-backed UserStore (compound auth persistence gap)
description: Auth UserStore stores all user accounts in Python dict. Server restart destroys all accounts. Combined with in-memory token storage (S-03) and in-memory sessions, restart wipes entire auth state. Create SQLModel-backed UserStore. Fix priority matches CRITICAL.
